title: helianthus praecox subsp. hirtus
intro: Helianthus praecox subsp. hirtus, also known as the early sunflower or hairy early sunflower, is a plant species belonging to the Helianthus genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthus praecox subsp. hirtus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
